description.sr: Sve konsultacije su uvek besplatne — dođite, popričajmo i napravimo plan tretmana prilagođen vama.
description.en: All consultations are always free — come in, let's talk and design a treatment plan tailored to you.

title.en: Example promo: -20% on laser hair removal

description.sr: Ovo je PRIMER. Izmenite ili obrišite ga u promotions.json. Postavite 'active': false da ga sakrijete, ili 'valid_until' (npr. "2026-07-31") da automatski istekne.
description.en: This is an EXAMPLE. Edit or delete it in promotions.json. Set 'active': false to hide it, or 'valid_until' (e.g. "2026-07-31") to auto-expire.
